data.title: 国际服歌曲「Tomodachi OneStep」MV公布

data.body:
[Tomodachi OneStep MV Release]

Sensei, Tomodachi OneStep MV is now live!
Check out the energetic new song performed by Antique Seraphim!

All together now—Antique! Seraphim!

➡️ Watch here: https://youtu.be/O5EAf9wH34Y

#BlueArchive
